_meta.description: Comprehensive audit of all $w('#...') element IDs used in Velo code. Melania uses this to assign nicknames in the editor Properties panel.
_meta.workflow: 1. Melania opens editor. 2. For each element below, find the comp-xxx element and rename to the nickname listed. 3. Once renamed, run remap-element-ids.js if any comp-xxx IDs were hardcoded.
_meta.priority_guide: P0 = page breaks without it, P1 = feature broken, P2 = enhancement missing

masterPage._priority: P0 — all pages depend on masterPage elements

P0.notes: Announcement bar container — nav hides this on scroll
Announcement bar text — also used by a11yHelpers
Carolina Futons logo — click navigates home
Shopping cart icon — opens side cart

P1.notes: Shop nav link — navigationHelpers wires click
X close button in mobile menu

P2.notes: Home nav link — gap, needs adding
Getting It Home nav link — gap

P0.notes: ARIA live region for screen reader announcements

homePage._priority: P0 — homepage is primary landing page

P0.notes: Product grid — rename from Gallery if swapped
Main product image — gallery, zoom, lightbox
Thumbnail gallery — onItemClicked swaps main image

P1.notes: Only X left in stock warning
Description accordion header — auto pattern infoHeader{Section}
Video section — shown only if product has video
White-glove delivery note for large items

P2.notes: Color tint overlay on product image
Share prompt text — dynamic based on purchased products

adminReturns._priority: P1 — admin dashboard for returns management

P1.notes: Coral dot for action-required items (repeater item)
Start return from order — proxied click target

orderTracking._priority: P1 — order tracking with real-time UPS updates

contactPage._priority: P1 — contact form, business info, appointment booking

buyingGuidePage._priority: P1 — individual buying guide detail page

P0.notes: Main content container — hidden on not-found

summary.notes: P0 elements must be renamed FIRST — code will break without them. P1 elements disable features. P2 elements are enhancements that gracefully degrade (empty catch blocks).
